title: Panels merged + Cast 0.5 on torso (more aggressive)
hypothesis: Same as r004 but pushes Cast harder. If the silhouette starts losing the tabard's vertical stripe or the shawl's shoulder bulge becomes a uniform blob, we know we've gone too far. If r005 still reads as Eldra but feels more sculpted than r004, we've found a stronger setting we can adopt as the default.
